sections.content: A focused day: a morning standup, the egress-grants design review at 11, a 1:1 with Priya, and a dentist appointment late afternoon. One billing item and a review sign-off need attention before 11.

Design review on egress grants at 11:00 in Room 4B with Aaron and Lena.
1:1 with Priya — good moment for the roadmap question.
Dentist appointment downtown closes out the day.

Reply to Lena with the two egress call examples — she's blocked on it for the 11am review.
Pay invoice #4471 ($1,204.00) — due tomorrow, will go overdue otherwise.
